chunks.title: Date and Siege Announcement
chunks.reason: Establishes the specific date of the prophecy and the historical context of the Babylonian siege.

chunks.title: Parable of the Boiling Pot
chunks.reason: Contains a complete symbolic narrative using a cooking pot to illustrate Jerusalem's impending judgment.

chunks.title: Ezekiel's Silent Grief
chunks.reason: Describes the command for Ezekiel to mourn his wife silently and the subsequent explanation of its meaning.

chunks.title: Restoration of Speech
chunks.reason: Concludes with a prophecy regarding the messenger who will bring news and Ezekiel's mouth opening.
